2267420.name: The Lost Bloodline Demo
2267420.description:
The Lost Bloodline Demo consists of a mission in which we show a bit of the gameplay, combat mechanics and a bit of story

Herodes has been arrested by the King's soldiers and has been wrongly accused of treason. Soon will be the execution of Herodes and it is necessary to rescue him. Dan is the only one capable of executing this mission, but the infiltration of the Courthouse must be welll planned.

Will Namik and Dan be able to rescue Herodes in time ?

Features:
- You will be immersed in a short story
- You will experience a 3rd person combat with touches of fantasy.
- Multiples enemy encounters with different abilities in which your skills are your ally.
2267420.supported_languages:
英语*, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西, 俄语, 繁体中文
*具有完全音频支持的语言
